sql: SELECT d.A3 AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS client_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('C','D') THEN l.loan_id END) AS active_loan_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status='B' THEN l.loan_id END)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('A','B') THEN l.loan_id END),0) AS finished_default_rate, AVG(d.A11) AS avg_branch_salary FROM district d LEFT JOIN client c ON c.district_id=d.district_id LEFT JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id=c.client_id LEFT JOIN account a ON a.account_id=dp.account_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id=a.account_id GROUP BY d.A3 ORDER BY d.A3; SELECT d.A3 AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status='B' THEN l.loan_id END)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('A','B') THEN l.loan_id END),0) AS finished_default_rate FROM district d LEFT JOIN client c ON c.district_id=d.district_id LEFT JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id=c.client_id LEFT JOIN account a ON a.account_id=dp.account_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id=a.account_id GROUP BY d.A3 ORDER BY finished_default_rate DESC;

charts.title: Default Rate by Region
metrics: COUNT(status B) / COUNT(status A or B)

filters: active loans where status in C,D
finished loans where status in A,B
chart_spec.layout_intent: Regional comparison view with the table occupying most width and a ranked default-rate bar beside it.
